title: Round Wooden Baubles 10PCS Natural Wood Slices Christmas Tree Hanging Ornaments Decoration Blank Wood Crafts for DIY Crafts Christmas Tree Decorations A6-SDSMPGJ (Bells)
features: Set Includes - 10pcs Christmas tree pendant blank wood chips and 10pcs twine.
Material - Made of natural wood, eco-friendly and smooth, reusable and durable.
Practical - Measures 6*0.3CM/2.36*0.12INCH, and the wood chips are blank on both sides for you to draw or write whatever you like.
Easy to Use - Each Christmas round wood chip comes with a small hole that can be put on with a string, easy to hang on the Christmas tree, window, door or anywhere you want.
Wide Usage - Wood chips make a great decoration for Christmas trees, gift tags, handcrafts, scrapbooking, signage or arts and crafts projects.
